reason: Tests verify gold-specific implementation details (PaddedPODArray<UInt8>, insertFromItself, validateFunctionArguments, etc.) via text matching, but the gold solution patch was created from merge commit cd0e0a0 which has additional changes beyond padString.cpp fix - the patch does not apply to base commit 6958fcb996ad34fe65d3d26d08de9cefd4788351. The solution/ directory is empty, so even if instruction were fixed, gold validation cannot succeed. Tests would need to be rewritten to verify runtime behavior (ASan no longer triggers) rather than exact text substitutions.
